details: The agent ran commands against the cluster (deploy list, deploy view, pods list, pods view) and correctly identified both required facts: (1) the rollout is stuck with ProgressDeadlineExceeded because the new ReplicaSet cannot progress, and (2) the root cause is the invalid image nginx:2.0-does-not-exist causing ImagePullBackOff on the new pod, while the old v1 pods continue serving traffic.
